title: Section 23
content: In the Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers' Rights Act, 2001,--- (a) in section 2,--- (i) clauses (d), (n) and (o) shall be omitted; (ii) for clause (q), the following clause shall be substituted, namely:--- '(q) "prescribed" means,--- (i) in relation to proceedings before a High Court, prescribed by rules made by the High Court; and (ii) in other cases, prescribed by rules made under this Act;'; (iii) clauses (y) and (z) shall be omitted; (b) in section 44, the words "or the Tribunal" shall be omitted; (c) in Chapter VIII, for the Chapter heading, the Chapter heading "APPEALS" shall be substituted; (d) sections 54 and 55 shall be omitted; (e) in section 56,--- (i) for the word "Tribunal", wherever it occurs, the words "High Court" shall be substituted; (ii) sub-section (3) shall be omitted; (f) in section 57,--- (i) for the word "Tribunal", wherever it occurs, the words "High Court" shall be substituted; (ii) sub-section (5) shall be omitted; (g) sections 58 and 59 shall be omitted; (h) in section 89, the words "or the Tribunal" shall be omitted.
